steps.title: Find the shared idea
steps.content: Text 1 says consumers' interest in lived experiences affects how festival organizers plan events. Text 2 says consumers' use of streaming services affects musicians' reliance on live performances.

steps.title: State the common effect
steps.content: Both texts connect changing consumer behavior with changes in music-related businesses. A claims a preference neither text states, B incorrectly limits the experiential economy to music, and D invents a causal link between festivals and streaming platforms. The answer is C.
